mapper.sql: SELECT r.*, e.name AS employee_name, e.department FROM dev_daily_report r LEFT JOIN dev_employee e ON e.id = r.employee_id
mapper.select: WHERE r.report_date = #{reportDate} ORDER BY e.sort ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dev_daily_report (report_date, employee_id, phone_count, platform_stats, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) VALUES (#{reportDate}, #{employeeId}, #{phoneCount}, #{platformStats}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE phone_count = #{phoneCount}, platform_stats = #{platformStats}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}
mapper.select: SELECT d.employee_id as employeeId, d.platform_stats as platformStats FROM dev_daily_report d WHERE d.report_date = ( SELECT MAX(d2.report_date) FROM dev_daily_report d2 WHERE d2.employee_id = d.employee_id )
